caption: A person with a white smartwatch and rings on their fingers uses a paper trimmer to cut patterned craft paper. The scene is set on a white wooden tabletop where a grey trimming machine with measurement grids is placed. In the initial sequence, the person’s left hand holds down a strip of green and yellow floral paper while their right hand operates the sliding cutting blade. As the action progresses, the blade moves across the paper, creating a clean cut. The person adjusts the paper to make subsequent cuts, moving a smaller piece of the floral paper under the blade. A piece of blue patterned paper sits to the left of the trimmer. Throughout the video, a watermark logo reading "Stamping Jill" is visible in the lower-left corner of the frames.
